meta.title: S4x20 Cabana Sessions
meta.description:
Most exhibits are tabletops in a hotel ballroom. S4's are outside around the pool, in January in Miami South Beach. Why come to Miami and spend all your time inside?

Seriously though, the attendees have found the time and atmosphere leads to building the relationships and more consequential discussions that make a difference.
